compressed_context:
H1: INTERNAL-DIVISION CLIMATE-CHANGE-LEADERSHIP  
CLAIM: MEMBER-STATES DIVERGE ECONOMIC-MEANS ∧ POLICY-INTERESTS ∧ EMISSIONS-PROFILES ;  
  ∴ DIFFICULTY ADOPTING HARMONISED COSTLY MEASURES  
CTX: EU ADOPTS KYOTO-PROTOCOL ∧ SETS EU-8% EMISSION-REDUCTION VS1990 FOR 2008–2012  
MECHANISM: EU AGGREGATES NATIONAL-TARGETS → INTERNAL BURDEN-SHARING  
DECISION: EFFORT-SHARING-DECISION(ESD) ALLOCATES NON-ETS EMISSION-CAPS PER MEMBER FOR 2013–2020  
SECTORS: NON-ETS=STEEL ∧ CEMENT ∧ CHEMICALS ∧ PAPER ∧ OTHER HIGH-CARBON-INTENSITY INDUSTRIES  
ISSUE: CARBON-LEAKAGE-RISK WHEN EU-CARBON-COSTS↑ → PRODUCTION SHIFT OUTSIDE EU ∧ GLOBAL-EMISSIONS↑  
RESPONSE: COMMISSION PROPOSES CARBON-LEAKAGE-LIST ∧ FREE-ALLOWANCES TO VULNERABLE SECTORS  
REGULATION: DECISION:2235/2003[EUP:2003-04-23] ESTABLISHES ALLOCATION-METHODS FOR ESD
